meaning: n.尤克里里琴(吉他型四弦拨奏乐器)
examples: No longer does nage simply accept whatever the uke dishes out.
The difference between this stage and the last is that in the last stage the nage allowed uke to initiate and then he led the "attention" of the uke via his own movement.
In the next level of technique not only does the nage initiate action to draw out uke's movement, but he USES the energy of his action to lead the response given him by uke.
It is easy to sound professional on many instruments - but not the uke, much less many at once.
On Uke Club night, the smell of Teriyaki chicken floats on the warm summer air, along with the beachy sound of tuning ukuleles.
